title: 11 Herbal Creams to Combat Difficulty Eating in Seniors
description: Aloe barbadensis creams contain properties that can help with difficulty eating. The gel inside the aloe leaf contains mucilage, a thick and soothing substance that can help reduce inflammation and irritation in the mouth and throat, making it easier to eat. Aloe barbadensis also contains vitamins, minerals, and antioxidants that can help protect the mucous membranes and prevent further irritation.
